The latest update is out from Springfield Properties PLC ( (GB:SPR) ).

Springfield Properties PLC has announced its total issued share capital, consisting of 119,042,405 ordinary shares, all with voting rights, as per the Financial Conduct Authority’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules. This announcement is significant for shareholders as it provides the necessary information for calculating their interest in the company’s share capital, impacting their disclosure obligations.

Spark’s Take on GB:SPR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:SPR is a Outperform.

Springfield Properties PLC receives a solid score, primarily driven by positive technical indicators and a significant insider purchase by the Chairman, which suggests confidence in the company’s future. The stable financial position and reasonable valuation contribute positively, although recent financial performance pressures present some challenges.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:SPR stock, click here.

More about Springfield Properties PLC

Springfield Properties PLC is a leading housebuilder in Scotland, specializing in the delivery of private and affordable housing.

An announcement from CSC Holdings Limited ( (SG:C06) ) is now available.

CSC Holdings Limited has launched two new series of commercial papers in digital securities on the SDAX platform. The 3-month Series 007 is priced at an interest rate of 4.95% per annum, while the 6-month Series 002 is priced at 5.20% per annum. data.title: Xeros Technology Announces Block Listing Correction and Share Admission
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Xeros Technology ( (GB:XSG) ) has issued an announcement.

Xeros Technology Group plc has announced a correction to the nominal value of its Ordinary Shares to 0.1 pence each in its recent application for a block listing on the London Stock Exchange. The block listing includes 5,000,000 ordinary shares, with 3,750,000 shares under the Enterprise Management Incentive Scheme and 1,250,000 under the unapproved share option scheme. The admission of these shares is expected to be effective around 6 June 2025, and they will be allotted in line with the company’s share option plans. This move is part of Xeros’ broader strategy to leverage its innovative technologies that reduce the environmental impact of clothing production, thereby strengthening its market position and offering potential benefits to stakeholders.

More about Xeros Technology

Xeros Technology plc is a company that has developed patented technologies aimed at reducing the environmental impact of clothing manufacturing and care. The company focuses on addressing the inefficiencies and pollution caused by traditional laundry and garment manufacturing processes, which consume significant water, energy, and chemicals. Xeros offers three main technologies: Microfibre Filter, Laundry Care, and Garment Finishing, targeting industrial laundries, domestic washing machine manufacturers, and garment manufacturers. The company generates revenue through licensing, royalties, and consumable sales, with the addressable markets valued at £350m, £3bn, and £132m annually, respectively.

Average Trading Volume: 1,323,080

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £9.63M

Puxing Energy Ltd. ( (HK:0090) ) has shared an update.

Puxing Energy Limited has announced its upcoming Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for June 27, 2025, in Hangzhou, China. Key agenda items include the adoption of the 2024 financial statements, re-election of executive directors, declaration of a final dividend, and re-appointment of KPMG as auditors. Cettire Ltd. ( (AU:CTT) ) has shared an update.

Cettire Ltd. has announced that First Sentier Investors RQI Pty Ltd, a wholly-owned subsidiary of First Sentier Investors Holdings Pty Limited, has acquired a substantial holding in the company. data.title: Hon Hai Precision Industry Announces NT$80.57 Billion Cash Dividend
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Hon Hai Precision Industry ( (HNHPF) ) has provided an announcement.

Hon Hai Precision Industry has announced a significant cash dividend distribution to its common shareholders, amounting to NT$80.57 billion, which translates to NT$5.8 per share. The ex-dividend date is set for July 2, 2025, with the payment date scheduled for July 31, 2025. This move underscores the company’s robust financial health and commitment to returning value to its shareholders. Shareholders are encouraged to register for electronic notifications of dividend payouts, and any changes to the dividend payout ratio due to bond conversions will be announced separately.

More about Hon Hai Precision Industry

Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd., also known as Foxconn, is a leading player in the electronics manufacturing industry. The company is renowned for its production of electronic components and products, serving major technology firms worldwide. Foxconn’s market focus includes consumer electronics, cloud computing, and smart devices.
